mapper.select: SELECT '섬기는 공동체' AS headline, '경영지원부 산하 각 부서는 예배와 운영, 봉사의 실무를 맡아 공동체가 안정적으로 사역할 수 있도록 섬기고 있습니다.' AS summary, parent_dept.dept_nm AS parent_department_name, leader.name_ko AS parent_department_leader, COALESCE(grade_code.code_name, position_code.code_name, leader.extra_attributes ->> 'role', '부서장') AS parent_department_leader_role, CASE parent_dept.dept_cd WHEN 'D000001' THEN '예배와 교회 운영 전반을 지원하는 실무 부서입니다. 재정, 전도, 차량, 봉사, 새가족, 찬양 사역이 유기적으로 연결되어 공동체의 기본 운영을 담당합니다.' ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_dept.remark, ''), parent_dept.dept_nm || ' 소개') END AS parent_department_description, parent_dept.dept_cd AS parent_dept_cd FROM hrm_org_dept parent_dept LEFT JOIN hrm_person leader ON parent_dept.chef_emp_no = leader.employee_no LEFT JOIN common_code grade_code ON leader.grade_code = grade_code.code AND grade_code.parent_code = '102' AND grade_code.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code position_code ON leader.position_code = position_code.code AND position_code.parent_code = '103' AND position_code.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE parent_dept.dept_cd = 'D000001' AND parent_dept.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT child.dept_cd AS dept_code, child.dept_nm AS title, CASE child.dept_cd WHEN 'D000003' THEN '헌금과 회계, 집행 내역을 정리하고 교회 재정 흐름을 안정적으로 관리합니다.' WHEN 'D000004' THEN '지역 전도와 복음 나눔, 전도 행사 지원을 통해 공동체의 외연을 넓히는 사역입니다.' WHEN 'D000005' THEN '예배와 행사 시 차량 운행과 이동 지원을 맡아 성도들의 참여를 돕습니다.' WHEN 'D000006' THEN '교회 행사와 상시 운영에 필요한 현장 지원과 봉사 인력 조정을 담당합니다.' WHEN 'D000007' THEN '새가족 맞이와 초기 정착을 도우며 공동체 연결을 지원합니다.' WHEN 'D000008' THEN '예배 찬양과 음악 사역을 준비하며 예배 흐름을 섬깁니다.' ELSE COALESCE(NULLIF(child.remark, ''), child.dept_nm || ' 소개') END AS description, leader.name_ko AS leader_name, COALESCE(leader_grade.code_name, leader_position.code_name, leader.extra_attributes ->> 'role', '부서장') AS leader_role, CASE WHEN leader.grade_code IS NOT NULL THEN leader.name_ko END AS pastor_name, CASE WHEN leader.position_code IN ('103-010', '103-020', '103-030') THEN leader.name_ko END AS elder_name FROM hrm_org_dept child JOIN hrm_org_dept parent ON child.parent_dept_key = parent.dept_key LEFT JOIN hrm_person leader ON child.chef_emp_no = leader.employee_no LEFT JOIN common_code leader_grade ON leader.grade_code = leader_grade.code AND leader_grade.parent_code = '102' AND leader_grade.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code leader_position ON leader.position_code = leader_position.code AND leader_position.parent_code = '103' AND leader_position.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE parent.dept_cd = #{parentDeptCd} AND child.use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY child.dept_cd

SELECT person.name_ko AS name, CASE WHEN person.employee_no = dept.chef_emp_no THEN '부서장' ELSE COALESCE(member_position.code_name, member_grade.code_name, person.extra_attributes ->> 'role', '팀원') END AS role, CASE WHEN person.employee_no = dept.chef_emp_no THEN COALESCE(person.ai_profile ->> 'summary', dept.dept_nm || ' 총괄') ELSE COALESCE(person.ai_profile ->> 'summary', person.extra_attributes ->> 'role', '부서 사역 참여') END AS summary FROM hrm_person person JOIN hrm_org_dept dept ON person.dept_cd = dept.dept_cd LEFT JOIN common_code member_grade ON person.grade_code = member_grade.code AND member_grade.parent_code = '102' AND member_grade.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN common_code member_position ON person.position_code = member_position.code AND member_position.parent_code = '103' AND member_position.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE person.dept_cd = #{deptCode} AND person.service_status_code = '101-010' ORDER BY CASE WHEN person.employee_no = dept.chef_emp_no THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, COALESCE(member_grade.sort_order, member_position.sort_order, 9999), person.employee_no
